title: Kinenbi Manga
titleNative: 記念日まんが
synopsis: A series of comics focusing on the different holidays celebrated every day, starting in January.

title: Future Is Wild Comic Version: Kyoi no Shinka o Togeta 2 Oku-nen-go no Semei Sekai
titleRomaji: Future Is Wild Comic Version: Kyoi no Shinka o Togeta 2 Oku-nen-go no Semei Sekai
titleNative: フューチャー・イズ・ワイルド コミック版 驚異の進化を遂げた2億年後の生命世界
synonyms: Future is Wild Comic Version: World Life After 200 Million Years of Amazing Evolution
synopsis: Manga series based on the "The Future Is Wild" documentary series as well as the "The Wild World of the Future" book.

tags.name: Animals

title: Dropkick on my Devil!
titleNative: 邪神ちゃんドロップキック
synopsis: When Yurine summons a devil from hell, she doesn't really know what to expect. She definitely doesn't expect that devil, Jashin-chan, to be stuck on earth. Now the two are reluctant roommates, and Jashin-chan is stuck forever unless she kills the person who brought her here. Wait a minute... (Source: Mangamo)

title: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleEnglish: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleNative: 29歳独身中堅冒険者の日常
synonyms: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer.
synopsis: One day, while dungeon-diving for work, Hajime the adventurer encounters a starving girl named Rirui. The poor girl has been abandoned by her parents and has no relatives she can rely on. Unable to turn a blind eye, Hajime declares, "If you're gonna join my party, then stop crying!" So begins their life together...but as it turns out, Rirui is no ordinary little girl! (Source: K MANGA)

title: The Hunter's Gonna Lay Low
titleNative: 헌터는 조용히 살고 싶다
synonyms: The Hunter Wants to Live Quietly
synopsis: Life's never quiet when you've got S-Rank Rizz. Former S-Rank Hunter Ui-Jae, a.k.a. J, saved humanity from eldritch horrors emerging from dimensional rifts, only to time-leap 8 years into a future where he's presumed dead. Now a manager at a hangover soup joint, all J wants is a quiet life. But between selling off the relics of his past and catching the obsessive attention of Korea's #1 Hunter Sa-Yeong, peace isn't on the menu! (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Kimi no Yokogao shika Mirenai
titleNative: 君の横顔しか見れない
synopsis: The popular Fujimori Sachi never faces Kishimoto Arata, who sits next to her in class. No matter how hard Kishimoto tries to see her face, she brilliantly turns away from him. As a result, he has only ever seen her side profile. But she talks to him normally otherwise. This mysterious girl seems to have a secret...? A cute school romantic comedy about a girl who only shows her side profile VS a boy who won't give up ♪ Originally a web manga released on the author's Twitter account since May 7, 2019. Official serialization began in Comic Gene on August 16, 2020.
searchTerms: 君の横顔しか見れない
synonyms: I Can Only See Your Side Profile

title: Mokuyobi no Ice-Cream
titleNative: 木曜日のアイスクリーム
synopsis: "When I came home from my ex-lover's funeral and entered the room where we lived together, I saw a white butterfly fly out of the refrigerator..." Contains 16 short stories in which the everyday and the extraordinary, the human and the non-human, coexist. - Azayakana Danmen (鮮やかな断面) - Na Mo Naki Asa (名もなき朝) - Platform (プラットホーム) - Kuchisake-san (くちさけさん) - Lunch Time (ランチタイム) - Nikui Tsumasaki (憎い爪先) - Semi Shirazu (蝉しらず) - Ima wa Kagiri (いまはかぎり) - Katachi ga Onajinara (かたちが同じなら) - Mayonaka, Bakubaku to (真夜中、ばくばくと) - Yoru ni Tsutsumaru (夜に包まる) - Hour Time (アワータイム) - Tanin Yogari (他人よがり) - 365 Po no Koshin (365歩の行進) - Mokuyobi (もくようび)

title: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: Danjohi 1:5 no Sekai demo Futsu ni Ikirareru to Omotta? Geki Juu Kanjou na Kanojotachi ga Mujikaku Danshi ni Honrousaretara
titleRomaji: Danjohi 1:5 no Sekai demo Futsu ni Ikirareru to Omotta? Geki Juu Kanjou na Kanojotachi ga Mujikaku Danshi ni Honrousaretara
titleNative: 男女比1：5の世界でも普通に生きられると思った？　～激重感情な彼女たちが無自覚男子に翻弄されたら～
synonyms: Did You Think You Could Live Normally Even in a World with a 1:5 Male-to-Female Ratio?
synopsis: Having arrived in a world where the male-to-female ratio is 1:5, the man Shoto tries to live an ordinary life as he did in his previous world. However, he unknowingly causes many women to fall in love with him this way, and the women develop intense feelings for him. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Fire Force
titleNative: 炎炎ノ消防隊
synopsis: Terror has paralyzed the clockwork metropolis of Tokyo! Possessed by demons, people have begun to burst into flame, leading to the establishment of a special firefighting team: the Fire Force, ready to roll on a moment's notice to fight spontaneous combustion anywhere it might break out. The team is about to get a very unique addition: Shinra, a boy who possesses the unique power to run at the speed of a rocket, leaving behind the famous "devil's footprints" (and destroying his shoes in the process). Can the Fire Force discover the source of this strange phenomenon and put a stop to it? Or will the city burn to ashes first? (Source: Kodansha USA) Note: Includes three extra chapters.
synonyms: หน่วยผจญคนไฟลุก

title: Takou no Koori-hime wo Tasuketara, Otomodachi kara Hajimeru Koto ni Narimashita
titleRomaji: Takou no Koori-hime wo Tasuketara, Otomodachi kara Hajimeru Koto ni Narimashita
titleNative: 他校の氷姫を助けたら、お友達から始める事になりました
synonyms: After Helping the "Ice Princess" from Another School, I Decided to Start as a Friend.
synopsis: Nagi Shinonome, known as the “Ice Princess,” is a beautiful girl with a cold attitude who does not get along with other people. One day, Souta Minori notices her being molested on the train and musters up the courage to step in and save her. The next day she comes up to him again and asks him... "I want you to stay by my side." Can Sota continue to be "just friends” with the "Ice Princess," who melts sweetly only for him? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai!
titleNative: みことちゃんは嫌われたくない!
synopsis: My beautiful, big-breasted childhood friend, Mikoto, is completely in love with me. It sounds like a dream scenario that anyone would envy — but there’s just one big problem... She’s turned into a clingy, mentally unstable mess with love that's way too heavy!! This is a dark everyday comedy about being at the mercy of Mikoto’s unstable behavior and unintentional sexiness. Note: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai! began as a web manga shared on the author's Twitter starting February 15, 2023, and has been published in print by Kadokawa since January 18, 2024.

title: Hatsumi-senpai wa Hoketsu
titleNative: 初見先輩は補欠
synopsis: "I wouldn't mind trying it with you, senpai." Hatsumi, a third-year substitute on the baseball team, flinches everytime at the slightly excessive skinship from Hinaki, a second-year regular. One day, however, Hatsumi witnesses Hinaki kissing another member of the club and begins to feel unsettled. A sensitive BL between a senior who is always an substitute and a junior who is a regular. (Source: East Press, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: ONIMAI: I'm Now Your Sister!
titleNative: お兄ちゃんはおしまい！
synopsis: Mahiro Oyama was just a normal erotic-game loving dude…until he woke up one morning as a woman! Turns out his mad-scientist little sister, Mihari, tried out one of her new experiments on him…with a disastrous outcome, as far as Mahiro’s concerned! But Mihari is as determined to study him as he is determined to go back to his shut-in, game-playing life, and one thing’s for sure…life is going to get a whole lot weirder from here on out! (Source: Kodansha USA) Note: Includes 57 extra chapters.

titleEnglish: Saved the Public Enemy by Mistake
titleNative: 不小心救了江湖公敌
synonyms: I accidentally saved the Jianghu's enemy
synopsis: The peaceful life of Lu Jiu is brought to an end when a teenage cultivator turns up before his medical hall, badly injured. The young physician saves the boy, not knowing that he's Liu Jianghe, a notorious man whom many want dead. Is it too late to kill him now? (Source: Bilibili Comics)

title: How to Handle My Sassy Big Sis
titleRomaji: Namaiki na Gal Ane wo Wakaraseru Hanashi
titleEnglish: How to Handle My Sassy Big Sis
titleNative: 生意気なギャル姉を解らせる話
synonyms: The Story of Making My Cheeky Gal Sister Understand
synopsis: She’s a big sister with an attitude, and every time she opens her mouth, it’s all just insults and negativity! However, her little brother has had enough, and he’s got a plan to turn her into the cute, honest sister he knows she can be! To make it work, he’ll first have to take her down a peg or two… (Source: Yen Press)
